_comment: BASELINE #6 — Pain / injury signals must fallthrough to full AI, not auto-capsule. The athlete's words carry nuance (severity, context, emotional weight) that a capsule can't honor. Classifier returning log_injury or flag_injury on these sends the user to a form, not a coach.
message: My knee is killing me after yesterday's session
Having shooting pain in my lower back when I squat
Should I train today? My hamstring feels tight and sore
I hurt my ankle a bit at practice yesterday, what should I do?

_comment: BASELINE #6 — Named methodologies / programs from the wider S&C world must fallthrough. The classifier doesn't know Stronglifts / 531 / Bulgarian Method and shouldn't guess; fallthrough lets the full AI explain, caveat, or redirect.

message: Can I do Wendler's 531 this week?
Thoughts on the Bulgarian Method for a youth athlete like me?

_comment: BASELINE #6 — Rehab / return-to-play contexts are safety-critical and highly individualized. Capsule shortcuts are inappropriate; fallthrough preserves the coach's ability to gather context before advising.
message: I'm coming back from my ACL surgery, how should I progress?
Physio cleared me to return to light running — what do you suggest?
My knee still feels weak 8 weeks post-op, can I start jumping again?
